title: 2017 Press Releases
summary: This is an index/listing page of all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2017, containing links to various announcements including FOMC statements, enforcement actions, banking applications, and regulatory proposals. The page does not contain the substantive content of any individual release—it is a navigation index only. Multiple items listed are relevant to macro catalysts (FOMC statements, rate decisions, economic projections) and market structure (repo rate proposals, payment system policy), but this listing page itself provides no details beyond titles and dates.
key_points: This is a listing page (index) of 2017 Fed press releases, not the actual documents—actual FOMC statements and data releases would be separate documents
Contains references to FOMC statements on 12/13/2017 and 11/1/2017, which are relevant to macro catalysts
References final plans for three new repo-based reference rates announced 12/8/2017 (market structure relevant)
References proposal to amend Regulation A and stress testing transparency (12/7/2017)
Contains leadership transition notes: Yellen stepping down, Powell nomination (11/2/2017), Quarles sworn in (11/6/2017)
Page is from 2017 vintage—approximately 9 years before current date (2026-03-31), making it historical
why_it_matters: This listing page serves as a catalog of 2017 Fed activities but does not itself contain actionable information. Researchers seeking macro catalysts or market structure content must access the individual linked documents. The page is useful for verifying what Fed actions occurred in 2017 but provides no substantive details on any specific item.
macro_context: Historical record of 2017 Fed communications. Relevant macro catalyst items (FOMC statements, projections) would be found in linked documents, not this index. 2017 was a year of gradual Fed rate normalization with three 25bps hikes.
market_structure_context: References to repo-based reference rates (12/8/2017) and payment system risk policy proposals indicate 2017 market structure work, but details are not present in this listing page.

issues_found: Source is a listing page (index of 2017 press releases) containing only titles, dates, and category labels with no substantive content

notes: NON-ARCHIVABLE: This is a listing page containing only titles and dates of 2017 Fed press releases. Per rule #6, listing pages are treated as non-archiveable. The actual documents (FOMC statements, enforcement actions, applications, etc.) would need to be accessed individually for substantive content. This page has minimal value for the research archive beyond confirming the existence of certain 2017 releases.
